title: Day 7 Lesson 3 ( Video )Inviting a friend
html:
Day 7 - Lesson 3

ともだち を さそう (tomodachi o sasou) = Inviting a friend

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　(kyooshitsu) = Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): りんさん りゅうがくせい, たかはしさん だいがくせい (Lin-san ryuugaksee, Takahashi-san daigaksee) = Lin-san study abroad student, Takahashi-san university student

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
